basic_details.job_title: District Court Bhadrak Senior Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Court Bhadrak Senior Clerk Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website of District Court Bhadrak. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the District Court Bhadrak Senior Clerk Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 70 years as on 17-06-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Retired ministerial staff who have retired from service on attaining the age of superannuation or on voluntarily retirement having a clean service record

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Court Bhadrak Senior Clerk Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download District Court Bhadrak Senior Clerk Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Court Bhadrak Senior Clerk post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Senior Clerk position at District Court Bhadrak is 17th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the age limit for the Senior Clerk position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Clerk post is 70 years as of 17th June 2026. There is no minimum age specified for retired candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must be retired ministerial staff who have attained superannuation or voluntary retirement with a clean service record to be eligible for the Senior Clerk post.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Clerk post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Clerk position in the District Court Bhadrak recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for the District Court Bhadrak Senior Clerk recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Clerk role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Clerk post will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their eligibility and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Senior Clerk position is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Which district court is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the District Court Bhadrak, located in Odisha.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will direct you to the relevant sections on the official website.
